subcodes.first_line: O Taqi! Fear God, thy Lord, and make mention of Him through that which hath guided thee and directed thee unto His straight path. Verily, the Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا تقی اتق الله ربک ثم اذکره بما ارشدک و هداک الی صراطه المستقیم ان البهاء
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @idle fancies; lust and passion
